title: Policies authorizing public access to resources are security sensitive
description: This rule identifies AWS S3 bucket policies that grant public read access to resources.
message: Public access to resources should be avoided.
recommendation: Deny public read access to S3 resources.

noncompliant.description: Public read access is granted to all authenticated users.

compliant.description: Access is granted only to specific IAM roles and not to public.

why_is_this_an_issue: Public access to resources can lead to unauthorized access, data leakage, and other security threats.
how_to_fix: Modify the S3 bucket policy to restrict access to authorized users or services only.

metadata.title: Policies authorizing public access to resources are security sensitive
